{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Orthos's human form
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] appeared in a weathered, gray-haired human form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
